content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates all four VIEW components throughout. Wonder is genuine and directed at the actual phenomenon — the coach gets curious about the mountain itself (turn 4) rather than treating the client's want as something to analyze. Impartiality is clear in turn 2: the coach refuses to issue a verdict on the selfish question, holding no agenda for what the client should conclude. Empathy is felt rather than performed — turn 6's 'notice what happened in your voice' is presence to the actual moment, not a sympathy noise. Vulnerability shows in the coach's willingness to name their own noticing ('I notice you went straight back') without authority-posturing. The pace is unhurried; the coach asks one question at a time and trusts the client to find their own ground. There is no fixing, no preacher-mode, no rush to compassion-for-partner. Turn 14's 'trust that one' lands as confirmation of what the client already discovered, not as the coach's agenda being delivered.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 10, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses verdict — impartiality intact. Names own choice transparently ('I'm not going to answer'). Single question, no stacking."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Wonder for the actual mountain, not abstract probing. Reflects what was noticed ('a lot of energy spent at the gate') without pushing."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Empathy as presence — tracks the live shift in the client's voice rather than summarizing feelings."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds space for fear without rushing. One clean question."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the real thing without judgment. Opens the childhood imprint from curiosity, not investigation."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Slows to the body. Does not lecture about the parent or push toward forgiveness."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Confirms what client discovered rather than installing it. Undefended, brief, trusting."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "The coach avoids both spiritual-narcissism and the jump-to-compassion trap — the want is allowed to be felt concretely (the cabin, the pine) before any reframe."
}
